title: Discovery and Requirements Gathering: User Research

payload.summary: Conduct interviews and surveys with project managers to identify their challenges and needs

title: Discovery and Requirements Gathering: Requirements Analysis

payload.summary: Analyze the research findings and define the functional and non-functional requirements for the system

title: System Design and Architecture: AI and Machine Learning

payload.summary: Define the AI models and algorithms that will power the system's decision-making and automation capabilities

title: System Design and Architecture: Integration and Connectivity

payload.summary: Design the integration points with external systems (e.g., project management tools, communication platforms) to enable data exchange and automation

title: System Design and Architecture: User Experience

payload.summary: Design the user interface and interaction flows to ensure a seamless and intuitive experience for project managers
Develop the core components of the system, including the AI models, integration layers, and user interface
Establish a comprehensive testing strategy and execute test cases to ensure the system meets the defined requirements

title: Deployment and Adoption: Deployment and Infrastructure

payload.summary: Set up the necessary infrastructure and environments to host and run the Auto Pilot AI system
Develop and execute a change management plan to facilitate the adoption of the system among project managers

title: Deployment and Adoption: Training and Support

payload.summary: Provide comprehensive training and ongoing support to ensure project managers can effectively utilize the Auto Pilot AI system
